diff: A maximum of 1,000,000,000 tokens can be transferred by Spark to the Spark Foundation in the first year for the purpose of rewarding contributors, and 500,000,000 tokens per year thereafter for the purpose of rewarding contributors.

A maximum of 1,000,000,000 tokens can be transferred by Spark to the Spark Foundation in the first year for the purpose of rewarding contributors, and 500,000,000 tokens per year thereafter for the purpose of rewarding contributors.
